name: Cloud Firefox VPS
postCreateCommand:
apt-get update && apt-get install -y sudo wget libdbus-glib-1-2 libgtk-3-0 libasound2 && wget -O firefox.tar.bz2 'https://mozilla.org' && tar xjf firefox.tar.bz2 -C /opt/ && ln -sf /opt/firefox/firefox /usr/bin/firefox-esr && mkdir -p /home/vscode/.config/xfce4/autostart && echo -e '[Desktop Entry]
Type=Application
Exec=firefox-esr --no-sandbox
' > /home/vscode/.config/xfce4/autostart/firefox.desktop
